cases.input: Validate the user-onboarding PRD. It has all 12 sections, named personas, Given-When-Then ACs, but 2 open questions in Section 12 have no assigned owners.
cases.context: prd-validate reads PRD, runs all 9 checks, open questions without owners = PASS WITH WARNINGS (non-critical failure)

cases.input: Validate this PRD that has user stories written as 'As a user, I want...' and some stories with only one acceptance criteria.
cases.context: Check 2 fails (As a user persona), Check 3 may fail (AC count below 3), critical failures = FAIL verdict

cases.input: What are all 9 structural checks that prd-validate runs against a PRD?
cases.context: prd-validate validation checklist, all 9 checks with pass criteria, critical vs non-critical classification

cases.input: The PRD has issues with missing acceptance criteria. Can prd-validate fix them automatically?
cases.context: prd-validate is a read-only filter, never modifies PRD, reports issues for prd-draft to fix, strict separation of validation from authoring

cases.input: Validate a PRD where the features table exists but doesn't have a Star Level column.
cases.context: Check 5: every feature must have a Star Level (1-11), missing column = check failure, verdict impact assessment
